# Requirements Analysis

## Description

Elicit, structure, and validate requirements from the human's statement of intent. Determine whether the intent is greenfield, brownfield, or a mix. Produce a structured requirements document with functional requirements, non-functional requirements, assumptions, and scope boundaries.

## Inputs (any of)

- `intent.md` (raw human intent — minimum starting point)
- `wireframes/` (if the team started with wireframes, derive requirements from them)
- `stories.md` (if the team started with stories, derive requirements from them)
- Existing requirements document provided by the human

## Outputs

- `requirements.md`

## Owner

product-owner
